title: Special Locations Zoning IR
description: Full IR produced by special-locations v1.0.0. Zone derivation + electrical constraints + fixture compliance audit for BS 7671:2018 Part 7 special locations (§701 baths, §702 pools, §703 saunas, §710 medical, §715 ELV). Per spec §5.

zone_id.description: Unique identifier for this zone within the IR.

zone_type.description: 13-value discriminator: 3 bath (BS 7671:2018 §701) + 3 pool (§702) + 3 sauna (§703) + 3 medical (§710 Groups 0/1/2) + 1 ELV (§715).

source_anchor_id.description: ID of the anchor_fixture from which this zone was derived.

derivation_clause.description: Top-level verified clause from which zone was derived (e.g. 'BS 7671:2018 §701'). Only use verified citations per spec §3.2 cross-reference table.

boundary_plan_polygon_mm.description: Plan polygon vertices in mm. minItems: 3 for any zone; cylindrical zones use ≥12-sided regular polygon centred on anchor. All coords in mm.

height_min_mm.description: Bottom of zone above floor level in mm.

height_max_mm.description: Top of zone above floor level in mm. Must be ≥ height_min_mm.

ip_rating_min.description: Minimum IP ingress protection rating for fixtures in this zone.

max_voltage_v.description: Maximum permitted circuit voltage in this zone. 12 = SELV only (§701.414.4.5 Zone 0). null = no voltage restriction applies.

rcd_required_ma.description: Required RCD residual operating current in mA. 30 = 30 mA RCD required per §701.411.3.3 or §703.411.3.3. null = no blanket RCD requirement from zone type alone.

isolation_required.description: Whether local isolation is required for circuits serving this zone.

allowed_equipment_classes.description: Equipment protection classes permitted in this zone (e.g. 'class_1', 'class_2', 'class_3_SELV').

prohibited_fixture_types.description: Fixture types explicitly prohibited in this zone (e.g. 'socket_230v', 'switch_230v', 'luminaire_non_ip_rated').

switch_position_min_distance_mm.description: Minimum distance from zone boundary to switch position in mm. null if no switch-distance constraint applies. Socket outlets ≥3000 mm from Zone 1 boundary per BS 7671:2018 §701.512.3.

overlapping_with_zone_ids.description: zone_id values of sibling zones whose plan polygon overlaps this zone. Populated by zone-derivation engine for INV-01 overlap audit.

_clause_citation.description: Jurisdiction-routed clause citation for this zone. GB: 'BS 7671:2018 §701'. KE: 'KS 1700:2018 §313 (route to BS 7671 §701)'. INT: 'IEC 60364-7-701'. Only use verified clauses from the README cross-reference table.

_derivation_note.description: Honest-disclosure engineering note explaining how zone geometry was derived from the anchor fixture. ≥40 chars required; zone derivation assumptions recorded here.

applies_to_room_polygon.description: Whether this constraint applies to the full room polygon (vs. specific zone_ids only).

applies_to_zone_ids.description: zone_id values this constraint applies to. null if applies_to_room_polygon is true and constraint has no zone-specific binding.

_clause_citation.description: Jurisdiction-routed clause citation for this constraint. Only use verified clauses from the README cross-reference table.

_derivation_note.description: Honest-disclosure engineering note for this constraint.

oneOf.description: medical_it_system — BS 7671:2018 §710 Group 2. IMD per BS EN 61557-8 (8 s alarm response). NHS sites: HTM 06-01 takes precedence.

isolating_transformer_va_min.description: Minimum isolating transformer rating in VA. Typical 3150–8000 VA for medical IT systems.

insulation_monitoring_device_required.description: Whether an IMD is required per BS EN 61557-8.

imd_alarm_response_time_s_max.description: Maximum IMD alarm response time in seconds. Const 8 per BS EN 61557-8. NOT 0.5 s — that was a prior misattribution.

safety_service_category.description: NHS safety service category per HTM 06-01. 1 = no-break, 2 = short-break, 3 = long-break. This is NOT a BS 7671 sub-clause value.

supplementary_bonding_required.description: Whether supplementary equipotential bonding is required in this medical location.

supplementary_bonding_max_resistance_ohm.description: Maximum resistance of supplementary equipotential bonding conductors in ohms. Const 0.2 Ω per BS 7671:2018 §710.

hospital_precedence.description: Mandatory cross-reference for NHS sites where HTM 06-01 takes precedence. Should be 'HTM 06-01'.

equipment_standard.description: Equipment safety standard cross-reference. Should be 'BS EN 60601 series'.

_verified_cross_refs.description: Verified external cross-references for this constraint. Expected: ['BS EN 61557-8', 'HTM 06-01', 'BS EN 60601'].

metallic_parts_listed.description: List of metallic parts requiring supplementary equipotential bonding (e.g. bath taps, radiators, exposed pipework).

bonding_conductor_csa_min_mm2.description: Minimum cross-sectional area of bonding conductors in mm². Typical 2.5 or 4 mm² per BS 7671:2018 §701.415.2.

oneOf.description: pool_main_equipotential_bonding — BS 7671:2018 §702.415.1. Conductor ≥10 mm² per verified clause. Use §702.415.1 only; the alternate clause number does not exist in the verified standards file.

extraneous_parts_listed.description: Extraneous conductive parts requiring main equipotential bonding (e.g. ladders, springboards, pipe fittings, pool surrounds).

conductor_csa_min_mm2.description: Minimum CSA of main equipotential bonding conductor in mm². ≥10 mm² per BS 7671:2018 §702.415.1.

oneOf.description: whirlpool_pump_circuit — BS 7671:2018 §701 + §701.512.2 (IPx5 where water jets used). No specific whirlpool sub-clause exists in the verified standards file.

pump_position_zone.description: zone_id of the zone where the whirlpool pump is positioned.

requires_local_isolation.description: Whether a local isolation switch is required for the pump circuit.

ip_rating_min.description: Minimum IP rating for pump/fixture where water jets used. Const IPx5 per BS 7671:2018 §701.512.2.

_whirlpool_general_citation.description: Honest disclosure: no specific whirlpool sub-clause in verified BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 file. Citation format: 'BS 7671:2018 §701 (no sub-clause for whirlpools in verified file)'.

oneOf.description: rcd_blanket_by_room — 30 mA RCD on all circuits per BS 7671:2018 §701.411.3.3 (bathrooms) and §703.411.3.3 (saunas). Sauna heater circuit is exempt per §703.411.3.3 clause body.

rcd_rating_ma.description: RCD residual operating current in mA. Const 30 per BS 7671:2018 §701.411.3.3 and §703.411.3.3.

applies_to_circuit_types.description: Circuit types subject to the RCD blanket requirement (e.g. 'lighting', 'sockets', 'shower_unit', 'fixed_equipment').

sauna_heater_excluded.description: Whether the sauna heater circuit is excluded from the RCD blanket. Set true for §703 rooms per §703.411.3.3 clause body.

oneOf.description: elv_separation — BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 transformer short-circuit protection. No §715 sub-clauses present in verified standards file.

lv_cable_spacing_mm_min.description: Minimum separation between ELV and LV cables in mm.

barrier_required.description: Whether a physical barrier is required between ELV and LV wiring.

label_required.description: Whether ELV circuit labelling is required to identify separation.

transformer_short_circuit_protected.description: Whether the ELV safety isolating transformer has short-circuit protection. Required per BS EN 61558-2-6.

_elv_general_citation.description: Honest disclosure: no §715 sub-clauses in verified BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 file. Citation format: 'BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)'.

drawing_type.description: Schema-level constant identifying this IR type.

version.description: Skill version that produced this IR (e.g. '1.0.0').

mode.description: full_analysis = zone derivation + electrical constraints + fixture compliance audit. screening_only = zone derivation only; no fixture audit (early-design pre-check when fixture layout is pending).

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction driving clause routing. GB = BS 7671:2018+A2:2022. KE = KS 1700:2018 §313 (route to BS 7671). INT = IEC 60364-7-XXX.

room_type.description: Room type driving Part 7 section selection.

is_wet_room.description: When true, Zone 1 polygon spans full floor area (no bath tray anchor; full floor is Zone 1). BS 7671:2018 §701.

is_external.description: True when room is external (drives §715 IP routing + D-5 ambient flag). When true, ambient_temperature_c SHOULD be supplied or D-5 reviewer flag fires.

ambient_temperature_c.description: Ambient design temperature in °C. Drives ELV cable de-rating per BS 7671 Appendix 4 Table 4B1 (for external installations) and sauna thermal cable rating per §703. Optional; defaults to 30°C with D-5 reviewer flag when room.is_external=true.

room.description: Mirror of input room descriptor. Drives zone-derivation geometry and section selection.

fixture_type.description: Anchor fixture type driving zone geometry derivation.

x_mm.description: X position in mm from room origin.

y_mm.description: Y position in mm from room origin.

z_mm.description: Z height above floor in mm.

dimensions_mm.description: Optional fixture footprint dimensions used by zone-derivation geometry engine.

_extraction_source.description: Provenance tier of this anchor position. architectural_drawing_extraction = strongest; inferred_from_room_type = weakest. Used by reviewer D-1 and INV-09.

_provenance_note.description: Honest-disclosure note explaining how anchor position was determined. ≥40 chars required per INV-09.

anchor_fixtures.description: Echo of input anchor_fixtures with resolved sub-fields. Source of truth for zone-derivation geometry.

zones.description: Derived zones, discriminated by zone_type (13-value enum). Output of the zone-derivation engine.

electrical_constraints.description: Electrical constraints applying to the room or specific zones. Required when mode == full_analysis or §710 Group 2 medical zone is present. Discriminated by constraint_type (6-value enum).

fixture_id.description: Identifier matching the upstream consumed intent's fixture record.

derived_zone_id.description: zone_id of the zone this fixture falls within. null if outside all derived zones.

compliance_status.description: Whether the fixture placement complies with zone requirements.

violation_clause.description: Jurisdiction-routed citation for the violated clause. null when compliant.

existing_fixtures_audit.description: Per-fixture compliance audit. Populated only when mode == full_analysis AND fixture data is available from consumed intent or explicit input. Every violation entry MUST have a corresponding non_compliance_flags entry (INV-02 drift guard).

compliant.description: AND of (no unflagged zone overlaps, all required constraints present, all fixtures compliant).

constraint_count.description: Total number of electrical constraints in this IR.

non_compliance_flags.description: Structured compliance flags. One-to-one with existing_fixtures_audit violation entries per INV-02.

assumptions.description: Engineering assumptions recorded during zone derivation (e.g. 'Whirlpool pump position defaulted to bath edge; IPx5 per BS 7671:2018 §701.512.2').

_zone_derivation_engine.description: Zone derivation engine identifier. Should be 'auto_from_anchors_v1.0' for v1.0 IR output.

_engineering_judgments.description: Reviewer-surfaced engineering judgment flags. Populated by reviewer D-checks.

calculation_summary.description: Rollup summary of zone derivation + compliance analysis. Per spec §5.5.

evidence.description: Evidence string for this invariant. maxLength: 1200 declared upfront per [[feedback-no-trim-non-consequential]] — INV-08 evidence legitimately carries fixture-id + zone-id + violation sub-rule + clause + remediation guidance across multi-violation cases.

invariants.description: Validator INV entries. Each INV check populates one entry.

rationale.description: Skill rationale: chat_summary (40–500 chars) + sections[] with engineering decisions.

allOf.description: Mode-conditional fixture audit + constraint requirement: full_analysis requires both existing_fixtures_audit and electrical_constraints; screening_only relaxes to zones-only (no fixture audit).
§710 Group 2 medical envelope mandates a sibling medical_it_system constraint per BS 7671:2018 §710 + BS EN 61557-8 (IMD 8 s alarm response). Enforced declaratively at schema level.
